instructions.usage: Copy this file to submission_metadata_answers.json, fill AUTHOR INPUT REQUIRED values, then run make_submission_metadata_from_answers.py --write-private.
instructions.privacy: submission_metadata_answers.json is ignored by Git and should contain private author and venue answers only.
instructions.autofill: Repository URL, current commit hash, and environment notes are filled from the current checkout by the conversion script.

funding.statement: No specific funding was received for this work.

acknowledgements.statement: The author thanks the developers of RevKit, mockturtle, CirKit, and ABC for their open-source tools.

competing_interests.statement: The author declares no competing interests.

data_availability.archive_link_or_doi: https://github.com/zhouzixiang1/sshr (to be made public upon acceptance)
data_availability.access_restrictions: No restrictions; all data and code are available upon publication.
data_availability.statement: All experimental data, analysis scripts, and LaTeX source files are maintained in the project repository.

code_availability.statement: Source code is available in the project repository under the MIT license.

ai_assistance.statement: AI-assisted tools were used for code development and manuscript editing. All scientific content, experimental design, and conclusions are the sole responsibility of the author.

preprint_and_prior_submission.prior_submission_history: No prior submissions of this manuscript.
preprint_and_prior_submission.statement: This manuscript has not been published elsewhere and is not under consideration by another venue.

cover_letter.target_editor: Prof. [Editor Name], ACM Transactions on Quantum Computing
cover_letter.editorial_routing_statement: This manuscript presents a resource-constrained neural Monte Carlo tree search framework for quantum Boolean oracle synthesis, combining reinforcement learning budget control with algebraic search over ANF/FPRM term sets. We believe it fits the scope of ACM Transactions on Quantum Computing in quantum compilation and resource optimization.

permissions.statement: All figures and tables in this manuscript were generated by the author from the experimental data in this work. No third-party copyrighted material is included.
